scenes.purpose: Ella tries to debug a system anomaly in the data center.
scenes.objective: To find the source of the feedback loop causing the system error.
scenes.turning_point: Marcus enters the room and proposes collaborating to fix the issue.
beats: Ella debugs code, frustrated by the complex system.
A system alert flashes, indicating a major anomaly.
Ella examines the interconnected loops on her screen for clues.

scenes.purpose: Ella and Marcus work together to debug the feedback loop.
scenes.objective: To resolve the system anomaly before it crashes the entire network.
scenes.turning_point: They realize the system's adaptive behavior mirrors human behavior, leading to a new approach.
beats: Ella and Marcus banter while working together.
They face challenges as the system logs crash repeatedly.
